pages.text: Craft melee-weapons class. Crafts the Paladin claymores, maces, and great hammers across iron, gold, and diamond tiers; the Rogue daggers, double axes, glaives, and sickles across the same three tiers; and four unpaired fantasy blades (Sharp Curved Sword, Fog Guard Sword, Dragonslayer Halberd, Spark of Dawn Polearm).$(br2)Netherite, aeternium, and ruby variants stay vanilla smithing-table upgrades from the bases.
